content.text:
Now I have a clear view of atom C:4 and its neighbour atoms. Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, I can identify the covalent bonds connected to atom 4 (C).

**Neighbour Atoms of Atom Index 4 (C):**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 3 | N |
| 5 | N |
| 21 | S |

**geomconf_index:** 8110

The carbon atom (C:4) has 3 neighbour atoms: two nitrogen atoms (N:3 and N:5) and one sulfur atom (S:21). C:4 is part of a fused heterocyclic ring system, and the 3-coordinate geometry is consistent with sp2 hybridization in an aromatic/conjugated system.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 4, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
